title: fumana gonzagae
intro: Fumana gonzagae, also known as Gonzaga's fumana, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Fumana gonzagae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
